thought.text: Let me test against more complex cases including ones with sylib.h:

action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && for c in functional-0/009_hex_defn.sysu.c functional-2/026_arr_defn.sysu.c functional-3/049_unary_op.sysu.c functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c mini-performance/crypto.sysu.c; do
  ./build/task/1/antlr/task1 build/test/task0/$c /tmp/out.txt 2>/dev/null >/dev/null
  echo "=== $c ==="
  diff /tmp/out.txt build/test/task1/$c/answer.txt | head -20
done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && for c in functional-0/009_hex_defn.sysu.c functional-2/026_arr_defn.sysu.c functional-3/049_unary_op.sysu.c functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c mini-performance/crypto.sysu.c; do
  ./build/task/1/antlr/task1 build/test/task0/$c /tmp/out.txt 2>/dev/null >/dev/null
  echo "=== $c ==="
  diff /tmp/out.txt build/test/task1/$c/answer.txt | head -20
done", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Test multiple cases"}
